description: Quantity shortfall: produced quantity (OperationsResponse) is below the planned quantity of the OperationsRequest/ProductionOrder.
$comment: Cross-source facet (CAPT-B Phase 2, building block 3): compares TWO entities across a join key — something the single-entity 'constraints' block cannot express structurally. Here: OperationsResponse.quantity_produced (actual) vs. OperationsRequest/ProductionOrder.qty_planned (planned), joined on production_order_no. HOLDS (ok) when actual >= planned; VIOLATED (multi_source discrepancy, raised) when actual < planned. Modeled as a true multi_source class (source_a=Response, source_b=Request, delta=produced-planned). SEMANTICS: 'when' filters out orders that are STILL OPEN (status=offen) — an open order has trivially produced 0, i.e. 'not started yet', not a quantity shortfall. Only orders that should already be finished are checked plan-vs-actual. Loaded by the it-evaluator next/-first (loadCrossRules), no source literals — only osf-schemas profileRefs + attribute names (SSOT).
